title: Vibe Test Generate Dry-Run Cache
description: Written at <project>/.vibe-test/state/last-dry-run.json. Captures the full output of a `/vibe-test:generate --dry-run` invocation so a later `--apply-last-dry-run` (within the 24h TTL) can replay the writes exactly.

cached_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dry-run was produced.

ttl_seconds.description: Seconds after `cached_at` beyond which the cache is considered expired. Default 86400 (24h).

repo_root.description: Absolute path to the project root the dry-run was scoped to. Used to guard against cross-project apply.

scope.description: Scope glob from --path, or null for full-repo dry-runs.

head_hash_at_generation.description: Recorded for branch-switch check at apply time.

session_uuid.description: sessionUUID of the originating dry-run session. Apply-session references it for provenance.

payload.description: Free-form SKILL-authored payload mirroring the three output views (markdown body, banner string, generate-state JSON). Structure is SKILL-owned; schema only enforces presence.

planned_writes.description: Ordered list of filesystem writes that would have been executed.

content_summary.description: Short human-readable description of what would be written.

confidence.description: For per-test writes, the SKILL's confidence assignment.

content.description: Optional full content cached for replay. SKILL may omit for large bodies and re-compose at apply time.
